ham.subject: Bank Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 Debit from XYZ Store
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a transaction of ₹5,000 from your account at XYZ Store on 15/04/2026. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our customer support immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
Your Bank Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks & Norton Invoice Verification Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Aapke QuickBooks account me ek unauthorized invoice detected hai aur aapka Norton subscription invoice pending hai. Immediate action is required to avoid service interruption and potential fines.

Login karein QuickBooks account me at <URL> aur invoice details verify karein. Also, check your Norton subscription details at the same link.

If you do not complete this verification within 24 hours, your account will be suspended.

Thank you,
QuickBooks & Norton Support Team
